title: cymbalaria alpina
intro: Cymbalaria alpina, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear or Alpen-Schuppen, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbalaria alpina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Cymbalaria alpina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
